Skin Problems: Skin Tear(s) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has a skin tear(s). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
447 M1040H_MASD_CD M1040H_MASD_CD M1040H Other Skin Problems: Moisture Associated Skin Damage CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has moisture associated skin damage. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
448 M1040Z_NO_OTHR_SKIN_PRBLM_CD M1040Z_NO_OTHR_SKIN_PRBLM_CD
